title: boechera calderi
intro: Boechera calderi, also known as Calder's rockcress, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off pathogens. Herbal preparations of Boechera calderi can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
